programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Jefferson, a traffic stop introduces officers to a chihuahua puppy. In Nye County, officers respond to an out-of-this-world call. Meanwhile in Lawrence, a traffic stop turns into a pursuit when a driver refuses to stop.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 leads the charge after a Greene County pursuit; in Warwick, a homeowner's security footage captures a suspected crime in progress; in El Paso, officers respond to a tipsy visitor knocking on neighborhood doors.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: One officer takes charge in an El Paso street fight while another pursues speeding motorcycles in Warwick, and a search for an armed robbery suspect in Salinas.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A chaotic scene unfolds outside a Pasco County convenience store; Cpl. Laurence and Deputy Addy Perez jump into action during a foot pursuit in Richland; Slidell officers follow a trail of bullet holes.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: When officers in California attempt to pull over a vehicle suspected to be involved in a carjacking, things get out of hand when both driver and passenger attempt to flee; officers in Virginia use a dog to help detain a fleeing suspect; an officer in Arizona chases down a suspect through a parking lot.

programme.title: Storage Wars
